headline: Kuaishou shares jump after Tencent joins $2.8 billion raise for Kling AI subsidiary
detail: Tencent's significant investment in an AI subsidiary signals strong institutional confidence and capital flow into the AI sector. This is a positive sentiment driver for tech and chip stocks, which form the core of your portfolio.
rec: This news supports a positive outlook for tech. Consider adding to your SMH position (scanner entry 586.43-584.71, stop 580.88) or initiating XLK (scanner entry 179.47-179.14, stop 178.4).

headline: Nvidia offers start-up customers chance to swap compute power for revenue share
detail: Nvidia's new program for start-ups indicates aggressive expansion into the AI market, fostering innovation and potentially increasing demand for its chips. This is a strong positive for the semiconductor sector.
rec: This reinforces the positive outlook for chip names. Consider adding to SMH (scanner entry 586.43-584.71, stop 580.88) or initiating XLK (scanner entry 179.47-179.14, stop 178.4).
